channel.title: Pier — Release notes
channel.description: The Pier macOS app auto-update feed. Each item is one released version.

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
What's new in 1.1.0

  • SFTP over SSH. Alongside FTP and FTPS, Pier now speaks true SFTP over SSH. Pick "SFTP (SSH)" from the protocol dropdown when adding a connection — port 22 is filled in automatically.
  • Auto-update. Pier now checks for new versions in the background and offers to install them with one click. Powered by Sparkle. Weekly checks by default.
  • Check for Updates… menu item under the Pier app menu so you can pull updates manually whenever you like.
  • License paste now strips wrapped newlines — emails that word-wrap your key across two lines no longer cause activation errors.
  • Bug fixes: cleaner menu titles (Pier instead of FTP Manager), more robust error classification for authentication failures, improved signing of native SSH crypto binaries.
